allow: Bash(pdftotext -layout "/d/DOWNLOADS/Kumpulan Soal Latihan Tes Bakat Skolastik LPDP \(1\).pdf" "/tmp/tbs_layout.txt")
Bash(pdftotext "/d/DOWNLOADS/Kumpulan Soal Latihan Tes Bakat Skolastik LPDP \(1\).pdf" "/tmp/tbs.txt")

Bash(node -e 'const fs = require\("fs"\); const vm = require\("vm"\); const code = fs.readFileSync\("js/tbs-bank.js", "utf8"\); const ctx = { window: {}, console }; vm.createContext\(ctx\); vm.runInContext\(code, ctx\); const b = ctx.window.TBS_BANK; console.log\("verbal:", b.verbal.length, "numerik:", b.numerik.length, "logika:", b.logika.length\);')

Bash(node -e 'const fs = require\("fs"\); const vm = require\("vm"\); const code = fs.readFileSync\("js/tbs-bank.js", "utf8"\); const ctx = { window: {}, console }; vm.createContext\(ctx\); vm.runInContext\(code, ctx\); const b = ctx.window.TBS_BANK; let bad = 0; for \(const cat of ["verbal","numerik","logika"]\) { b[cat].forEach\(\(q, i\) => { if \(!q.q || !Array.isArray\(q.opts\) || q.opts.length < 2 || typeof q.a !== "number" || q.a < 0 || q.a >= q.opts.length || !q.exp\) { console.log\("BAD", cat, i\); bad++; } }\); } console.log\("bad:", bad\);')

Bash(node -e 'const fs=require\("fs"\); const vm=require\("vm"\); const code=fs.readFileSync\("js/tbs-bank.js","utf8"\); const ctx={window:{},console}; vm.createContext\(ctx\); vm.runInContext\(code,ctx\); const b=ctx.window.TBS_BANK; console.log\("verbal:",b.verbal.length,"numerik:",b.numerik.length,"logika:",b.logika.length\);')
